view.title: Validate persona scenario #5

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario where the group size changes after booking. However, the evidence provided does not include specific details or checks confirming that this scenario is implemented or operational within the system. The linked use cases and prior steps indicate various gaps in evidence regarding the functionality of the intake form and its related features, leading to an inconclusive status.
